assignment.title: Python 算術與比較運算符練習
assignment.content:
Python 運算符練習

編寫一個 Python 程式，從輸入中讀取兩個整數 a 和 b（每行一個）。

按順序打印以下運算結果，每個結果佔一行：

  1. 加法 (Addition): a + b
  2. 減法 (Subtraction): a - b
  3. 乘法 (Multiplication): a * b
  4. 除法 (Division): a / b
  5. 取模/餘數 (Modulo): a % b
  6. 整除 (Floor Division): a // b
  7. 指數 (Exponentiation): a ** b
  8. 大於 (Greater than): a > b
  9. 小於 (Less than): a < b
  10. 大於或等於 (Greater than or equal to): a >= b
  11. 小於或等於 (Less than or equal to): a <= b
  12. 等於 (Equal to): a == b
  13. 不等於 (Not equal to): a != b
assignment.code_template:
a = int(input())
b = int(input())

# 在下方編寫你的運算與打印程式碼
assignment.modal_solution:
a = int(input())
b = int(input())

print(a + b)
print(a - b)
print(a * b)
print(a / b)
print(a % b)
print(a // b)
print(a ** b)
print(a > b)
print(a < b)
print(a >= b)
print(a <= b)
print(a == b)
print(a != b)
